overrides.expect: t _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if j = 0} \\ 1 & \text {if j = 1} \\ t _ {j - 2} - q _ {j - 1} t _ {j - 1} & \text {if j\geq 2} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: t_{j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text{if } j = 0 \\ 1 & \text{if } j = 1 \\ t_{j - 2} - q_{j - 1} t_{j - 1} & \text{if } j\geq 2 \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: s _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text {if j = 0} \\ 0 & \text {if j = 1} \\ s _ {j - 2} - q _ {j - 1} s _ {j - 1} & \text {if j\geq 2}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: s_{j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text{if } j = 0 \\ 0 & \text{if } j = 1 \\ s_{j - 2} - q_{j - 1} s_{j - 1} & \text{if } j\geq 2. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: c _ {j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text {if j = 0} \\ q _ {1} & \text {if j = 1} \\ q _ {j} c _ {j - 1} + c _ {j - 2} & \text {if j\geq 2} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: c_{j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text{if } j = 0 \\ q_{1} & \text{if } j = 1 \\ q_{j} c_{j - 1} + c_{j - 2} & \text{if } j\geq 2 \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: (x _ {i}, a _ {i}, b _ {i}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} (1, 0, 0) & \text {if i = 0} \\ f (x _ {i - 1}, a _ {i - 1}, b _ {i - 1}) & \text {if i\geq 1}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: (x_{i}, a_{i}, b_{i}) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} (1, 0, 0) & \text{if } i = 0 \\ f(x_{i - 1}, a_{i - 1}, b_{i - 1}) & \text{if } i\geq 1. \end{array} \right.
